'''chagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:paedagogically|paedagogically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:paedagogically|paedagogically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chagate|chagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chagatesher|chagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chagatesherĂ«m|chagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chagatero|chagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chagateshĂ«|chagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chagateshĂ«m|chagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichagatero|gokichagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichagateshĂ«|gokichagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichagateshĂ«m|gokichagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochagankerom|gochagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochagankeshĂ«|gochagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochagankeshĂ«m|gochagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochagankeya|gochagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chagaterom|chagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chagatemu|chagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chagateya|chagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichagaterom|gokichagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichagatemu|gokichagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichagateya|gokichagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chagagate|chagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chagagatesher|chagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chagagatesherĂ«m|chagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chagagatero|chagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chagagateshĂ«|chagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chagagateshĂ«m|chagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichagagatero|gokichagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichagagateshĂ«|gokichagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichagagateshĂ«m|gokichagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochagagankerom|gochagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochagagankeshĂ«|gochagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochagagankeshĂ«m|gochagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochagagankeya|gochagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chagagaterom|chagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chagagatemu|chagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chagagateya|chagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichagagaterom|gokichagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichagagatemu|gokichagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichagagateya|gokichagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠgĂŠte|chĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠgĂŠtesher|chĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠgĂŠtero|chĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠgĂŠtero|gokichĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠgĂŠterom|chĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠgĂŠtemu|chĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠgĂŠteya|chĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠgĂŠterom|gokichĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠgĂŠteya|gokichĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafgafte|chafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafgaftesher|chafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafgaftesherĂ«m|chafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafgaftero|chafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafgafteshĂ«|chafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafgafteshĂ«m|chafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafgaftero|gokichafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafgafteshĂ«|gokichafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafgafteshĂ«m|gokichafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafgafnkerom|gochafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafgafnkeshĂ«|gochafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafgafnkeshĂ«m|gochafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafgafnkeya|gochafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafgafterom|chafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafgaftemu|chafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafgafteya|chafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafgafterom|gokichafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafgaftemu|gokichafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafgafteya|gokichafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
